articles.title: About this site
articles.description: Some additional details about the website

articles.contents:
Seth Watts

            Welcome to my personal website!
            I am a third year PhD student at Arizona State University in the Criminology and Criminal Justice Program, and I work in the Center for Violence Prevention and Community Safety. I broadly focus on policing and program evaluation. Specific interests include policing and public health, particularly opioid related issues.
